title: Trauma Candidate Row
description: One trauma-claim candidate emitted from worker observations of fuckup-log classes not yet absorbed into INCIDENTS.md or flywheel-recovery SKILL.md Forever-Rules. Consumed by skillos via flywheel-skillos-relay.

class.description: The trauma class observed (matches fuckup-log .class field)

N.description: Count of class occurrences in the rolling saturation window

fuckup_log_ref.description: Reference to source row(s): file_path#L<line> or file_path:ts=<iso>

dispatch_log_task_id.description: Linked dispatch task_id if the trauma fired during a dispatch

proposed_disposition.description: Emitter's classification: known=already in INCIDENTS/SKILL; new=novel; duplicate=links to existing trauma-candidate

recommended_skillos_loop.description: Which skillos loop should ingest: 2=worker-finding intake; 4=trauma-class accretor; 5=research-triad

evidence_excerpt.description: Excerpt from the source fuckup-log row (what_happened field, sanitized)

session.description: Session where the trauma was observed

skillos_handoff_message_id.description: Populated after flywheel-skillos-relay handoff; null until then
